verses.text: Luke continues his account; Jesus 'shewed himself alive after his passion by many infallible proofs,' forty days speaking of the kingdom. Sure proof. The resurrection rests on solid evidence.
Luke continues his account; Jesus 'shewed himself alive after his passion by many infallible proofs,' forty days speaking of the kingdom. Sure proof. The resurrection rests on solid evidence.
Luke continues his account; Jesus 'shewed himself alive after his passion by many infallible proofs,' forty days speaking of the kingdom. Sure proof. The resurrection rests on solid evidence.
He bids them wait at Jerusalem for the promise; 'ye shall be baptized with the Holy Ghost.' Wait for power. The work waits on the Spirit's coming.
He bids them wait at Jerusalem for the promise; 'ye shall be baptized with the Holy Ghost.' Wait for power. The work waits on the Spirit's coming.
Not for you to know the times; 'ye shall receive power... and ye shall be witnesses unto me... unto the uttermost part of the earth.' The great commission. The Spirit empowers a worldwide witness.
Not for you to know the times; 'ye shall receive power... and ye shall be witnesses unto me... unto the uttermost part of the earth.' The great commission. The Spirit empowers a worldwide witness.
Not for you to know the times; 'ye shall receive power... and ye shall be witnesses unto me... unto the uttermost part of the earth.' The great commission. The Spirit empowers a worldwide witness.
He is taken up in a cloud; 'this same Jesus... shall so come in like manner.' Sure return. The ascended Lord will come again as He went.
He is taken up in a cloud; 'this same Jesus... shall so come in like manner.' Sure return. The ascended Lord will come again as He went.
He is taken up in a cloud; 'this same Jesus... shall so come in like manner.' Sure return. The ascended Lord will come again as He went.
They return and 'continued with one accord in prayer.' Waiting in prayer. The church is born in united supplication.
They return and 'continued with one accord in prayer.' Waiting in prayer. The church is born in united supplication.
They return and 'continued with one accord in prayer.' Waiting in prayer. The church is born in united supplication.
Peter speaks of Judas, who shared the ministry yet fell to his place. A solemn fall. Even an apostle may betray his trust.
Peter speaks of Judas, who shared the ministry yet fell to his place. A solemn fall. Even an apostle may betray his trust.
Peter speaks of Judas, who shared the ministry yet fell to his place. A solemn fall. Even an apostle may betray his trust.
Judas's dreadful end fulfils the Scripture, 'let another take his office.' Written beforehand. God foretold both the fall and its filling.
Judas's dreadful end fulfils the Scripture, 'let another take his office.' Written beforehand. God foretold both the fall and its filling.
Judas's dreadful end fulfils the Scripture, 'let another take his office.' Written beforehand. God foretold both the fall and its filling.
One must be chosen 'to be a witness... of his resurrection.' Qualified witness. The apostle must have seen the risen Lord.
One must be chosen 'to be a witness... of his resurrection.' Qualified witness. The apostle must have seen the risen Lord.
They set forth two and pray; the lot falls on Matthias, numbered with the eleven. Sought of God. They commit the choice to the Lord.
